dict.string: ZeroClaw needs camera access for photo capture automation.
ZeroClaw needs microphone access for voice commands and audio recording.
ZeroClaw needs speech recognition for voice transcription.
ZeroClaw needs Automation permission to control other applications via AppleScript.
ZeroClaw needs Screen Recording to see what is on screen so the agent can act on the current context.
ZeroClaw needs Input Monitoring to receive global hotkeys and observe user activity outside its own windows.
